text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of Mejiro Bright's debut, she shows up
at the track carrying a doll. She's as carefree as
usual, it seems.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, I can tell that she's trying to act her normal
self to help remain calm. She's plenty serious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I'll go at my own pace," she mutters before
heading into the paddock.
